statement: As of 2026-07-05, RunPod on-demand H100 SXM GPU rental is $3.29/hr (H200 $4.39, B200 $5.89, B300 $7.39), with H100 SXM in a roughly $3.29-3.99/hr band across RunPod and Lambda Cloud.
why: No baseline or change is stated, so the rental figure is a static price level and a display overlay rather than a directional demand or supply signal.

impact.mechanism: GPU-cloud rental price levels describe neocloud market pricing but, absent a stated change, do not score demand or supply.

confidence.basis: Two independent secondary provider price lists (RunPod, Lambda) corroborate the H100 SXM band; price level only.
